chunks.title: Genealogy of the Priests from Levi to Exile
chunks.reason: A continuous genealogical list tracing the priestly line from Levi through Aaron down to the exile.

chunks.title: Genealogy of the Levite Families
chunks.reason: A detailed genealogical list covering the sons of Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

chunks.title: Levitical Singers and Their Lineages
chunks.reason: A catalog of the singers appointed by David, including their genealogical lines.

chunks.title: Roles of Levites and Aaron's Lineage
chunks.reason: A summary of the general service of Levites followed by a specific genealogy of Aaron's sons.

chunks.title: Cities Given to the Sons of Aaron
chunks.reason: A list of cities and pasture lands assigned to the priestly families from Judah and Benjamin.

chunks.title: Cities Given to the Rest of Kohathites
chunks.reason: A list of cities assigned to the remaining Kohathite families from Ephraim and Manasseh.

chunks.title: Cities Given to Gershom and Merari
chunks.reason: A list of cities assigned to the families of Gershom and Merari from various tribes.
